element_introduction_order.element: Basic falling columns with three symbols
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn left/right movement and symbol rotation mechanics
Core loop established; gravity-based cascades teach chain reactions
Difficulty ramps through play duration; players must increase decision speed
Unpredictable resource; creates both strategic opportunities and cascading chain reactions

element_introduction_order.element: Points-based opponent handicap system (reduce opponent row, reclaim own row)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Resource management decision-making; cost/benefit of spending accumulated points

element_introduction_order.element: Single-use items (Barrier, Heavy Weight, Magic Gem, Hourglass)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Strategic item selection before opponent encounters; Hourglass provides second-chance mechanic

element_introduction_order.element: AI opponents with themed difficulty (bats, mummies, pyramid setting)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Thematic progression through pyramid rooms; difficulty scales with opponent selection

typical_relief_triggers: Successful match-3 elimination clears board space
Cascade chain reactions resolve multiple layers at once
Spending points to reduce opponent's playable space
Magic Jewel activation removes all same-colored symbols
Item use (Barrier blocks incoming damage, Hourglass grants continue)
typical_tension_triggers: Columns fall faster as play progresses
Opponent's well fills up toward loss condition
Opponent lands Magic Jewels that shrink player's space
Limited item inventory depletes through use
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Tension builds incrementally through accelerating fall speed and board saturation; relief cycles occur through successful match clearing and cascade resolution; competitive turn-like rhythm where each player's action raises or lowers tension for opponent

difficulty_curve.early_game: Easy mode provides accessible introduction with early story mode completion; players learn symbol matching and basic gravity mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Medium mode extends story progression; fall speed increases noticeably; Magic Jewels and point-spending mechanics add strategic layers
difficulty_curve.late_game: Hard mode extends full pyramid progression; opponents become more aggressive; board management becomes critical; cascades harder to predict
notable_spikes: Transition from early to medium mode: fall speed acceleration becomes significant
Introduction of Magic Jewel encounters: unpredictability increases
Opponent space reduction plays: player must balance offensive and defensive point spending
Hard mode pyramid rooms: cumulative difficulty from multiple opponent encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Story mode progresses through different rooms of a pyramid with themed opponents (bats, mummies) and increasing difficulty; structure creates narrative advancement tied to mechanical difficulty scaling
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Pyramid rooms (generic progression structure; specific room names not documented)

notable_level_patterns.description: Two-player (human vs AI) competitive format where one player's board accumulation becomes the other's loss condition; head-to-head rhythm creates mutual pressure escalation
Single-use items obtained in story mode create consumable resource constraints; Hourglass continues allow limited second attempts; item management becomes meta-layer above core match-3 mechanics
